response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship values, but their profile diverges substantially from this role's core requirements. They fall far short of the 8 years of C++ experience (only ~7 months at National Instruments plus a thesis project), their systems work is primarily in DLang and Node.js rather than C++, and they lack demonstrated experience leading technical strategy for large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. Their leadership experience is oriented toward teaching and community workshops rather than formal technical leadership of platform teams.
strengths: High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Broad polyglot engineering background with strong testing/TDD and CI/CD practices
Mentoring inclination shown through workshops, courses, and long-running open-source project ownership
concerns: Far below the required 8 years of C++ experience; recent work is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
No production-level cloud compute platform architecture or ownership of large-scale infrastructure strategy
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or driving cross-team alignment
